{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211312191962C0B08BDC55F2A4B8"}"},"total":2985},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7008796565418951439","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看完，情节跌宕起伏，细节严谨。写出了公安职业的艰辛和自豪感。可以改编成电视剧，一定叫座"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631862618,"group_id":"6983297848636869645","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+1M8AHNApyGf7wp/Zc8NqE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616560&x-signature=%2FYXVdYO%2FVKzIgYSc4FplMZloIxQ%3D","user_id":"71904576910","user_name":"爱吃兰花金针的万友亮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"71904576910","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297848636869645","book_info":{"abstract":"一部集侦查学、痕迹学、社会学、尸体解剖学、犯罪心理学之大成的教科书式破案小说！有时真相让人毛骨悚然，有时真相让人热泪盈眶。《侯卫东官场笔记》作者全新悬疑力作。
39桩大案要案、68个犯罪现场、107种侦查手段、614位涉案人员，侯大利这本刑侦笔记，将为您重现真实的案发现场，还原每一桩命案从调查、取证、抓捕到侦破的全过程。
16年为爱追凶，几次直面生死，侯大利把大脑磨炼成电脑，把眼睛淬炼成显微镜，逐一锁定案发现场和尸检中的关键信息。凭借变态级的观察力，他往往透过庞杂的社会关系，率先圈定凶手的行为特征和成长环境，将其缉拿归案。怀着命案必破的信念，侯大利从一个菜鸟迅速成长为行走的刑侦教科书。
翻开本书，带您见识教科书式的破案手法和刑侦智慧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b27ef6190ba283c9761cfc7a2bc3aca9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小桥老树","author_id":"","book_id":"6983297848636869645","book_name":"侯大利刑侦笔记大全集（全9册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382810","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"98.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7433617535125179454","read_count":"9999","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1865186"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"104","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b27ef6190ba283c9761cfc7a2bc3aca9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253939&x-signature=U2KV32cZ3eXvK7294vSFWjMtK8g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.15245003e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211312191962C0B08BDC55F2A4B8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":115244,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":29447},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7052247078702039840","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太精彩了！侯大利太可怜了，我很同情他，也很敬佩他！每个人物刻画得都很有个性。栩栩如生。情节紧凑，非常优秀的小说，停不下来。可惜没有音频。","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":38,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search 尴尬好消遣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686048056,"group_id":"6983297848636869645","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1s4sCODkL9LH5wdG15fJBH47u4PDaQ/9UrSjt3+7h58","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2318240050326279","user_name":"喜欢黑豆果的飞皇哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2318240050326279","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297848636869645","book_info":{"abstract":"一部集侦查学、痕迹学、社会学、尸体解剖学、犯罪心理学之大成的教科书式破案小说！有时真相让人毛骨悚然，有时真相让人热泪盈眶。《侯卫东官场笔记》作者全新悬疑力作。
